acceptance_criteria.text: Pin repopact==1.8.0 in requirements-repopact.txt and remove the vendored RepoPact modules (scripts/validate_repo.py, scripts/frontmatter.py, scripts/repo_model.py); governance validation runs via `python -m repopact_cli validate`.
Update schemas/record-frontmatter.schema.json to the 1.8.0 decision status vocabulary (adds rejected and deferred); schemas remain in-repo as the repository's own contracts.
`python -m repopact_cli validate` passes on the repository with RepoPact consumed from PyPI (decision 0008).
